title: koeleria macrantha var. rohlenae
intro: Koeleria macrantha var. rohlenae, also known as mountain hair grass, is a perennial grass native to Central Europe. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria macrantha var. rohlenae include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
